cves.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Internet Shortcut Files Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows Internet Shortcut Files contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for a security feature bypass.
cves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

cves.shortDescription: Race condition in mm/gup.c in the Linux kernel allows local users to escalate privileges.

cves.vulnerabilityName: Ignite Realtime Openfire Path Traversal Vulnerability
cves.shortDescription: Ignite Realtime Openfire contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to access restricted pages in the Openfire Admin Console reserved for administrative users.
cves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

cves.vulnerabilityName: Jenkins Command Line Interface (CLI) Path Traversal Vulnerability
cves.shortDescription: Jenkins Command Line Interface (CLI) contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows attackers limited read access to certain files, which can lead to code execution.
cves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

cves.shortDescription: Oracle E-Business Suite contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Web Applications Desktop Integrator.

cves.vulnerabilityName: Linux Kernel Heap Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
cves.shortDescription: Linux Kernel contains a heap out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain privileges or cause a DoS (via heap memory corruption) through user name space.
cves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
